rulings.Case Title: EDWIN KEITH STEPHENS et al VS. CAL-WESTERN RECONVEYANCE CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 7, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s WITH DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to November 25, 2013 to be heard with other pending motion. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than November 12, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide a copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than November 12, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 7, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF MOUNIR KARDOSH's Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN Y. CHIU et al VS. BRUCE SPROUL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 7, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT BRUCE SPROUL and 2ND BLESSING, INC.'s MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Proof of Service by registered Process Server "December 3, 2013" on the Summons is a de minimus mistake, no prejudice shown. = (501/REQ)
